it does not handle external data inputs that could be exploited.\n  - The registration pattern is standard and does not introduce injection or execution risks.\n\n### Scores and Justifications:\n- The assigned scores (malware: 0, obfuscated: 0, securityRisk: around 0.1) are reasonable given the benign nature.\n- The **securityRisk** score is slightly above zero (0.1) in some reports, reflecting minimal inherent risk, which is acceptable.\n- The **malware** score is correctly 0 across all reports, indicating no malicious intent.\n\n### Potential Discrepancies or Overestimations:\n- No report suggests any reason to increase the malware or security risk scores.\n- The source map comment (`//# sourceMappingURL=Container3dElement.js.map`) is standard for development and debugging;
